Source URL: https://www.score.org/small-business-resource-hubs/

# BOSS Lifecycle to SCORE Resource Crosswalk

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, boss-crosswalk, lifecycle-routing

## Resource purpose
Crosswalk mapping BOSS lifecycle phases to SCORE resource pages and templates.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use this when the model needs to quickly route a user based on diagnosed business stage.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Key resources or subresources
- Phase 1 Ideation: https://www.score.org/startup-roadmap/ — Startup Roadmap, Am I Ready, Target Customer, Product/Service Description Worksheet, Business Model Canvas, SCORE mentor.
- Phase 2 Validation: https://www.score.org/market-research/ — Market Research, Pricing & Business Model, Target Market Data Worksheet, Break-Even Analysis, Financial Readiness, mentor.
- Phase 3 Formation: https://www.score.org/business-plan/ — Business Plan, Legal Structure education, Licenses & Permits education, Register Business/EIN education, Taxes & Accounting Setup, Startup Budget & Projections.
- Phase 4 Launch: https://www.score.org/marketing-your-launch/ — Marketing Your Launch, Attract Your First Customers, Marketing Plan Guide, Marketing Calendar, live workshops.
- Phase 5 Mature Operations: https://www.score.org/manage-grow/ — Cash Flow Management, Financial Statements, Process Improvement, Employees/Contractors, Risk/Compliance, Business Health Check.
- Phase 6 Growth: https://www.score.org/advanced-programs-for-small-businesses/ — Manage + Grow, Leadership/Management, Digital Marketing/SEO, Customer Retention, Advanced Programs, mentor/advisory support.
- Phase 7 Exit/Transition: https://www.score.org/transition-exit/ — Transition + Exit hub and Simple Steps for Exiting course where current.
- Recovery/Troubleshooting: https://www.score.org/disaster-prep-recovery/ — Disaster Prep & Recovery, Cash Flow Management, Risk/Compliance, Process Improvement, Business Health Check, mentor triage.

## BOSS routing notes
- Always route by current stage and immediate decision, not by everything SCORE offers.
- Use special-resource hubs only when the user’s profile or expressed need makes them relevant.
- Keep regulated topics general and refer final decisions to qualified professionals/official agencies.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
